description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with a slim build, wearing a cropped short-sleeve top and short denim-style shorts. She is accessorized with a large, angular tricorn hat, fingerless gloves, and knee-high boots with prominent cuffs and horizontal stripes on the socks. Her stance is relaxed, with arms slightly bent and hands open, suggesting a casual or confident demeanor. The character's hair is styled in a short, layered cut that is partially visible beneath the hat. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a modern, urban pirate or adventurous street fashion, with exaggerated proportions and cartoon-like features.
description: A stylized female pedestrian in a cropped top, short shorts, tricorn hat, gloves, and knee-high boots, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cropped top, shorts, gloves, boots, and the full face partially obscured by the large tricorn hat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hat, the curve of the torso, and the layered hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cropped top, shorts, and the hat's full width, as well as the back of the boots and socks.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the chest profile, arm, and the side of the boots and gloves.
attribute_clothing_type: cropped short-sleeve top, short denim-style shorts, fingerless gloves, knee-high boots, tricorn hat
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly bent
attribute_hairstyle: short layered hair partially covered by hat
